quick.step1: You'll open 3 packs of 14 cards each
quick.step2: Pick one card per pack, then pass the rest to AI drafters
quick.step3: Packs alternate direction each round — left, right, left
quick.step4: After all picks, build a 40-card deck and play a match

pod.step1: You're drafting with {{count}} players in a pod
pod.step2: Open 3 packs of 14 cards — pick one, pass the rest
pod.step3: Packs alternate direction each round — left, right, left
pod.step4: After drafting, build a 40-card deck and play tournament matches

hostControls.title: Host Controls
hostControls.endDraftConfirm: End this draft for everyone? This cannot be undone.

setSelector.noPools: No draft pools available. Run the draft data pipeline first.

limitedDeck.emptyDeckHint: Click cards from the pool to add them to your deck.

landing.title: Draft
landing.description: Quick draft against AI, build a cube, or host a pod with friends.

quickDraft.title: Quick Draft
quickDraft.description: Draft 3 packs with 7 AI drafters, build a 40-card deck, then play a Bo1 match against one of them.

cubeDraft.title: Cube Draft
cubeDraft.description: Paste or load a cube list, tune pack and deck rules, then quick draft against AI bots.

podDraft.title: Pod Draft
podDraft.description: Host or join a pod with up to 8 players, draft live together, then play a Swiss or elimination tournament.

cubeSetup.exportUrlPlaceholder: Paste a raw export URL, or paste the list below

formatPicker.title: Your deck is ready
formatPicker.subtitle: Choose how you want to play.

single.label: Single Match
single.description: Play one Bo1 match with your drafted deck.

bo3.label: Best of Three
bo3.description: Play a Bo3 match with sideboarding between games.

run.label: Full Run
run.description: Play Bo1 matches until you reach 7 wins or 3 losses.

podSetup.title: Pod Draft
podSetup.subtitle: Draft with friends — open packs, pick cards, and play tournament matches.
podSetup.hostCardDesc: Create a new draft room. You choose the set, format, and pod size — then share the room code with your friends. Empty seats can be filled with bots.
podSetup.joinCardDesc: Enter a room code from the host to join an existing draft. You'll be seated in the next open slot and draft alongside everyone in real time.
podSetup.howItWorks1: Each player opens 3 packs of 14 cards — pick one, pass the rest
podSetup.howItWorks2: Packs alternate direction each round (left → right → left)
podSetup.howItWorks3: After drafting, everyone builds a 40-card deck from their pool
podSetup.howItWorks4: Then play Swiss or single-elimination tournament matches
podSetup.kindPremierDesc: Best-of-one tournament matches after deckbuilding. Faster rounds, no sideboarding between games.
podSetup.kindTraditionalDesc: Best-of-three tournament matches after deckbuilding, with sideboarding between games.
podSetup.tournamentSwissDesc: Everyone keeps playing through three rounds, even after a loss.
podSetup.tournamentEliminationDesc: Players are eliminated after a match loss until one winner remains.
podSetup.policyCompetitiveDesc: Timed picks, automatic picks on timeout, and automatic round advancement.
podSetup.policyCasualDesc: Untimed picks, manual round advancement, and host controls for resolving issues.
podSetup.podSizeDesc: {{count}} total seats. Empty seats can be filled with bots from the lobby before the draft starts.
podSetup.setSelectorHint: Choose the draft set last. Selecting a set loads its card pool and creates the pod room.

podPhaseView.waitingNextRound: Waiting for host to start next round...

pauseReason.DisconnectGraceExpired: A player did not return in time.

betweenGames.lostPreviousGame: You lost the previous game. Choose:
betweenGames.waitingSideboard: Waiting for opponent to submit sideboard...
betweenGames.sideboardHint: Make sideboard changes, then submit. Your pool is available below.

podError.kicked: You were kicked from the pod

lobby.title: Draft Pod Lobby
lobby.waitingForHost: Waiting for host to start the draft...
